sections.paragraph: ἁγιάζω [ἅγιος] ‘set apart into the realm of the sacred’, in our lit. with focus on elimination of that which jeopardizes access to God. Of things purify Mt 23:17, 19; 1 Ti 4:5; of pers. purify, set apart, dedicate J 10:36; 1 Cor 7:14; Hb 9:13; of Christ given priority in one’s inner life 1 Pt 3:15; of all beneficiaries of divine inheritance Ac 20:32; of God’s name revere Mt 6:9; Lk 11:2.
